title: Thelocactus macdowellii
taxonomy: Thelocactus macdowellii belongs to the family Cactaceae, commonly known as the cactus family. It is a species of cactus within the genus Thelocactus. The genus Thelocactus is a group of small to medium-sized cacti that are native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. Thelocactus macdowellii specifically is native to the Mexican states of Chihuahua and Durango. This species is often classified as a succulent plant, characterized by its ability to store water in its stems.
